title: henckelia pectinata
intro: Henckelia pectinata, also known as the toothed or pectinate henckelia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Henckelia pectinata is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
